title: Add doctor checks and migration docs for Atlas transition
description: Make Sentinel able to diagnose migration mistakes and explain the Atlas transition path directly instead of leaving compatibility as tribal knowledge.
acceptanceCriteria: Doctor checks can identify common Atlas migration mistakes or stale legacy assumptions
Migration docs explain what Atlas owns, what Sentinel owns, and how products move between the two
The docs include a compatibility phase rather than implying immediate replacement
The resulting guidance is strong enough for FitKind and Sitches adoption work
proofRequirements: doctor tests or fixtures cover migration diagnostics
nonGoals: writing product-specific adoption docs in Sentinel

notes.text: Execution started for Atlas migration doctoring. The slice will add Atlas-aware doctor checks plus explicit migration guidance for compatibility-phase products.

Completed Atlas migration doctoring by adding doctor --atlas-manifest/--session-index diagnostics, script-wiring checks, explicit migration docs, and fresh proof at ~/Desktop/screenshots/sentinel/atlas-doctor-proof.png.
